deterministic.description: Plans are represented as one combined plan PDF placeholder before any candidate activation review.

deontic.description: Supporting document placeholders remain separate from the plan PDF placeholder.

temporal.description: Source freshness review must precede any later manual promotion decision.

reversible.description: Local preview planning remains reversible and candidate-only.

refused.description: Official upload actions remain refused by this inactive candidate.

exact_confirmation.description: Manual release review and exact confirmation are required before any later activation path.

agent_facing_explanations.template: This inactive candidate can explain missing single PDF preparation evidence, but it cannot activate a guardrail or perform an official action.

reviewer_rows.release_blocker_note: Manual source-evidence, predicate, gate, explanation, and rollback review must pass before release consideration.
reviewer_rows.rollback_note: Discard the inactive candidate metadata and rebuild from approved synthetic reviewer rows if review fails.
